title: stachys danica
intro: Stachys danica, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. Traditionally, Wood Betony has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and soothing respiratory issues. Wood Betony can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes used in skincare products due to its astringent and antimicrobial properties.
